explanation: The user wants to place an apple into the fridge. Since the robot is not currently holding the apple, it first picks up the apple using the Pick_up action. Then, it navigates to the fridge using Go_to. Finally, it places the apple into the fridge using Place. The object 'apple' is referenced as a new object, so it is assigned the suffix _0 as no other apple is mentioned in the discussed_objects. The fridge is a valid receptacle for storing food items.
